use_codes.desc: VIVJOA IS INDICATED TO REDUCE THE INCIDENCE OF RECURRENT VULVOVAGINAL CANDIDIASIS (RVVC) IN FEMALES WITH A HISTORY OF RVVC WHO ARE NOT OF REPRODUCTIVE POTENTIAL
